tests.scenario: Verify the system launches reliably without crashing
steps: Observe the home screen for errors
tests.expected_result: The system launches successfully within 5 seconds without crashing or displaying errors

tests.scenario: Verify system stability after prolonged use
steps: Use the system continuously for at least 2 hours
Monitor for crashes or performance degradation
tests.expected_result: The system remains stable, responsive, and functional throughout usage

tests.scenario: Verify clear and transparent payment terms
steps: Review pricing, billing cycles, and cancellation policies
tests.expected_result: All payment terms are clearly displayed and easy to understand

steps: Access account settings and billing details
tests.expected_result: Users can access and understand subscription and billing information easily

tests.scenario: Search for meditation content using keywords or categories
tests.expected_result: Relevant meditation content is displayed efficiently and matches search criteria
tests.notes: Tests functionality and relevance of search feature.

tests.expected_result: Search results are relevant and match the search query

tests.scenario: Test customer service responsiveness and issue resolution
steps: Submit a support request via chat or email
tests.expected_result: Customer service responds within 24 hours and resolves the issue efficiently
tests.notes: combines tests 7 & 8. Covers FR4 hybrid requirement for support responsiveness.

tests.scenario: Verify fast system loading and seamless navigation
steps: Navigate through multiple screens and content pages
tests.expected_result: All screens and content load within 2 seconds
Subscription is cancelled easily within two steps without errors

tests.scenario: Test meditation feature usability and support
steps: Use reminders and progress tracking features
tests.expected_result: Features support meditation effectively and are positively verified by survey

tests.scenario: Verify account and content synchronization across devices
steps: Access content and settings on each device
tests.expected_result: User account, content, and progress are synchronized consistently across all devices

tests.scenario: Verify clarity of update information and release notes
steps: Review release notes and change information
tests.expected_result: All updates and changes are clearly described and easy to understand, verified by survey

tests.expected_outcome: The system allows users to provide feedback and ratings successfully

steps: Verify they are recorded and acknowledged
tests.expected_outcome: The feedback and ratings are submitted and acknowledged by the system
